balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Default routing preset. Stable quality/cost ratio for chat, review, and execute.

contract.text: BAGO 4.8.0 routing preset 'balanced'. Routing decisions stay within the ollama-local provider unless an explicit override is requested via /switch or --provider. Models must be declared in .bago/config.json providers.*.default_model. The preset does not authorize cross-provider side effects, silent model swaps, or credential retrieval. Any violation is logged to .bago/state/audit.log with correlation_id.

cheap.label: Cheap
cheap.description: Lowest-cost local model. Useful for smoke tests and CI dry-runs.

contract.text: BAGO 4.8.0 routing preset 'cheap'. Forces the smallest model advertised by the active provider and disables tool calling to keep cost at zero. Used by --dry-run and CI. Output is informational only and must not be promoted to a release artifact.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Highest-quality local model. Used for evidence bundles and release reviews.

contract.text: BAGO 4.8.0 routing preset 'quality'. Routes to the largest local model configured in .bago/config.json. Tool calling and streaming are enabled. Evidence bundles generated under this preset include the preset name in manifest.json#routing_preset for auditability.
